questions.question: Is TokenRequiredError defined in textbrush/model/weights.py as a class inheriting from Exception?
evidence_required: File path and line number of TokenRequiredError class definition
questions.pass_criteria: TokenRequiredError class exists in weights.py and inherits from Exception

questions.question: Does download_flux_weights() return Path (not None) on successful download?
evidence_required: Return type annotation '-> Path' in function signature
questions.pass_criteria: Function annotated '-> Path' and test confirms isinstance(result, Path)

questions.question: Does download_flux_weights() raise TokenRequiredError when HF_TOKEN is not set and model is not cached?
questions.pass_criteria: Test passes with TokenRequiredError raised and 'HF_TOKEN' in error message

questions.question: Does download_flux_weights() NOT require HF_TOKEN when model is already cached (force=False)?
questions.pass_criteria: Test passes — no TokenRequiredError raised when is_flux_available() returns True

questions.question: Does GatedRepoError from HuggingFace hub raise TokenRequiredError with license message?
questions.pass_criteria: TokenRequiredError raised with license URL reference in message

questions.question: Does HfHubHTTPError with status 401 or 403 raise TokenRequiredError?
evidence_required: Error messages include HTTP status codes
questions.pass_criteria: Both 401 and 403 HTTP errors raise TokenRequiredError

questions.question: Does ensure_flux_available() reference 'textbrush --download-model' instead of 'make download-model'?
Do all 20 tests in test_weights.py pass?

mandatory_questions.question: Does ruff report zero linting issues for the modified files?
Do the pre-existing 611 passing tests still pass (no regressions introduced)?
evidence_required: All 123 tests in story-relevant test files pass
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: 123/123 tests pass in test_cli.py, test_weights.py, test_config.py
